invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$2950（基于ATR止损），或资金费率Z值升至>50%且价格下跌（挤压失效），或Qlib得分大幅下降（相对强度减弱）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $2950 (ATR-based stop), or funding Z-score rises >50% with price decline (squeeze invalidated), or Qlib score drops significantly (relative strength weakens).
